howItWorksPreview.title: How it works
howItWorksPreview.subtitle: Book trusted pet care in three simple steps.
howItWorksPreview.stepBookDesc: Secure payment, free cancellation, EUR 2,000 guarantee
howItWorksPreview.stepRelaxDesc: 90% of our commission goes to animal rescue

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Tinies is a marketplace. We connect pet owners with independent service providers, and adopters with rescue organisations and transport providers. We don't walk dogs, sit pets, or run adoptions ourselves — we provide the platform, handle payment, and take a small commission so we can fund rescue animal care.
howItWorks.forOwnersSubtitle: Book trusted care in a few clicks.
howItWorks.forAdoptersIntro: Rescue organisations list animals available for adoption. Transport providers offer their logistics services. You browse, apply, and connect — all through Tinies. We provide the platform and payment; rescues and transport providers run their side. Think of it like Airbnb: we don't own the homes.

ownerSteps.title: Search verified providers
ownerSteps.text: Find independent carers near you by service type, location, and availability. Every provider is ID-verified and reviewed. Tinies lists them; they provide the care.

ownerSteps.title: Book securely
ownerSteps.text: Pay with card through Tinies. Payment is only captured when your provider accepts. Cancel for free if plans change before acceptance.

ownerSteps.title: Get updates
ownerSteps.text: Receive photo and message updates during the booking. For walks, track the route in real time if the carer has started the walk.

ownerSteps.title: Leave reviews
ownerSteps.text: After the stay, leave a star rating and review to help other owners and build your carer's reputation.

adopterSteps.title: Browse animals
adopterSteps.text: Explore adoptable dogs and cats listed by rescue organisations on Tinies. Filter by species, age, and destination country.

adopterSteps.title: Apply
adopterSteps.text: Submit an application with your home situation, experience, and vet reference. The rescue reviews and approves — they run their own adoption process.

adopterSteps.title: Rescue and transport handle logistics
adopterSteps.text: The rescue and transport providers handle vet prep, vaccinations, microchip, EU pet passport, and transport. Tinies gives you the platform to connect and pay; they do the coordination.

adopterSteps.title: Track progress
adopterSteps.text: Follow each step in your dashboard — from vet completion to transport booked to departure and arrival.

adopterSteps.title: Welcome your tiny home
adopterSteps.text: Check-ins at 1 week, 1 month, and 3 months. Share your story for Tinies who made it and inspire the next adoption.
